race.description: Fred Vella Tyre & Crash Repair Hcp (C1)
race.comment: SASSY LITTLE MISS (6) made the perfect return at headquarters two weeks ago when racing on pace and going right on with the job to score with a bit in hand. Is sure to have come on from that and gets a good chance to repeat the dose. ZOUTRAIL (9) is struggling to land her second winning blow but it certainly isn't without trying. Doesn't need to improve much to break through. BEL RAGAZZO (1) progressed nicely second-up when leading the charge here and digging deep to hold them all at bay. Rises significantly in weight off that maiden win which will make things tricky but he deserves respect. PRECIPICE (3) has improved in his last two and is open to further further-up. Holder's booking is a good sign. Keeping safe.
